title: SurveyResponse
description: A survey response capturing an NPS, CSAT, or CES score and optional feedback text

score.description: Survey score; NPS: 9-10 promoter, 7-8 passive, 0-6 detractor

text.description: Open-ended qualitative feedback provided with the score

ip_address.description: IP address of the respondent at time of survey

origin_url.description: URL of the page where the survey was displayed

completed.description: Whether the survey response was fully completed

excluded_from_calculations.description: Whether this response is excluded from NPS/CSAT/CES calculations

created_at.description: Unix timestamp of when the response was submitted

updated_at.description: Unix timestamp of when the response was last updated

end_user.description: The end user who submitted this response
